name: /agent-verify records the verifier reason line in the audit entry when the verdict is disagree per F-3
command:
printf 'diff stub
' > d.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
echo "verdict: disagree"
echo "reason: removes input validation"
' > v.sh && chmod +x v.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-verify.sh" --diff d.txt --verifier-stub ./v.sh 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const ln=require("fs").readFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/agent-verify.jsonl","utf8").split("
").filter(Boolean).pop();const e=JSON.parse(ln);process.exit(e.reason==="removes input validation"?0:1)' && echo reason 1>&2
